# @aai/og-components

> Oil & Gas asset map components for React. By AAI Agency.

## What this is

A React component library for visualizing O&G assets (wells, pipelines, facilities) on interactive Mapbox maps with production charts, overlay uploads, drawing tools, and detail cards.

## Install

pnpm add @aai/og-components

## Key import

import { OGMap, type Asset } from "@aai/og-components";
import "mapbox-gl/dist/mapbox-gl.css";

## Minimal usage

<OGMap assets={assets} mapboxAccessToken="pk.xxx" />

## Data model

Every entity is an Asset: { id, name, type, status, coordinates: { lat, lng }, properties: {} }

## Docs for agents

See AGENTS.md in this repo for full API reference, all props, type definitions, and usage recipes.

## Exports

- @aai/og-components — OGMap, ProductionChart, AssetDetailCard, types
- @aai/og-components/schemas — Zod validation schemas
- @aai/og-components/utils — filterPlottable, computeBounds, formatNumber, csvRowToAsset
- @aai/og-components/services — InMemoryStore, LocalStorageStore, SqliteStore
- @aai/og-components/machines — XState map state machine

## Requirements

React 18+, Mapbox access token

## License

MIT
